assetRef.description: Heavy-asset reference. `transferSize` (bytes, compressed transfer size) is mandatory on every heavy-asset reference (AD-2): tap-to-load labels and the Constrained ceiling read only this field. Populated at assemble/freeze.

citation.description: Per-Block provenance link to a Grounding Chunk. Required fields are the retrieval-guaranteed set only (AD-2); citation integrity inside immutable Published Versions rests on stored excerpt + documentTitle, never on id dereference back to edon-rag.

poster.description: Poster image for heavy blocks (Model3D, Simulation). Required first-class data (FR-18): the poster is the instant first paint, the degraded-tier path, and the flag-off render. altText/longDescription per the stakeholder-approved text-alternative contract; caption is the one-line explanation that lets the poster stand alone pedagogically.

blockBase.description: Base envelope every block satisfies, including unknown future types (minor forward-compat). `id` is the stable slot id minted at plan stage (AD-23) — citations, view marks, patches, and progress rows all key on it.
